precautions_en: Avoid using harsh exfoliants prior to your HydraFacial. Expect mild redness for 1-2 days post-treatment. If you're traveling, schedule your appointment well in advance of important events and minimize sun exposure afterwards. Consider activity intensity when planning the procedure.
aftercare_ko: Following your HydraFacial, diligently apply sunscreen and avoid saunas and hot springs. Limit alcohol consumption to prevent inflammation. You can generally resume normal activities the next day. Monitor for any unusual redness or itching and consult a doctor if needed.
aftercare_en: Following your HydraFacial, diligently apply sunscreen and avoid saunas and hot springs. Limit alcohol consumption to prevent inflammation. You can generally resume normal activities the next day. Monitor for any unusual redness or itching and consult a doctor if needed.

description_ko: A Thread Lift uses special threads to instantly lift and tighten the skin, improving elasticity. This quick procedure offers noticeable results and relatively fast recovery. Expect a natural-looking lifting effect.
description_en: A Thread Lift uses special threads to instantly lift and tighten the skin, improving elasticity. This quick procedure offers noticeable results and relatively fast recovery. Expect a natural-looking lifting effect.
precautions_ko: Please note that a 1-3 day recovery period may be needed. If you are visiting from abroad, schedule your treatment with ample time and minimize sun exposure. Avoid alcohol and aspirin intake before the procedure.
precautions_en: Please note that a 5-7 days recovery period may be needed. If you are visiting from abroad, schedule your treatment with ample time and minimize sun exposure. Avoid alcohol and aspirin intake before the procedure.
aftercare_ko: For the first few days after your Thread Lift, avoid strong sunlight, saunas, hot springs, and alcohol. Light activities are generally fine, but strenuous exercise should be avoided for about a week. Contact the clinic if you experience excessive swelling, bruising, or persistent pain.
aftercare_en: For the first few days after your Thread Lift, avoid strong sunlight, saunas, hot springs, and alcohol. Light activities are generally fine, but strenuous exercise should be avoided for about a week. Contact the clinic if you experience excessive swelling, bruising, or persistent pain.

description_ko: This Glutathione IV drip delivers skin brightening and antioxidant benefits directly into your bloodstream. With a quick treatment time and no downtime, experience a radiant complexion from within.
description_en: This Glutathione IV drip delivers skin brightening and antioxidant benefits directly into your bloodstream. With a quick treatment time and no downtime, experience a radiant complexion from within.
precautions_ko: A consultation with a doctor is essential to determine the right treatment plan for you. Mild bruising or swelling may occur with a 1-3 day recovery period. If you're visiting, schedule your treatment early in your trip and minimize sun exposure afterwards.
precautions_en: A consultation with a doctor is essential to determine the right treatment plan for you. Mild bruising or swelling may occur with a minimal downtime (a few hours). If you're visiting, schedule your treatment early in your trip and minimize sun exposure afterwards.
aftercare_ko: Protect your skin from the sun after treatment, and avoid alcohol, saunas, and hot springs for a few days. You can generally resume normal activities within a few days, but contact your doctor if you experience excessive redness, itching, or other unusual symptoms. Maintain good hygiene practices, especially while traveling.
aftercare_en: Protect your skin from the sun after treatment, and avoid alcohol, saunas, and hot springs for a few days. You can generally resume normal activities within a few days, but contact your doctor if you experience excessive redness, itching, or other unusual symptoms. Maintain good hygiene practices, especially while traveling.
